name: acpx-ui
description: ACPX UI Monorepo - Frontend and Backend

scripts.dev: bun run --filter frontend dev & bun run --filter backend dev
scripts.build: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:backend
scripts.test: bun run test:frontend && bun run test:backend
scripts.lint: bun run lint:frontend && bun run lint:backend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules acpx-fork/node_modules frontend/dist backend/dist
